title: Mooblooms
description: A mod adding colorful and flowery cows. Moo!
body:
Mooblooms is a mod inspired by Minecraft Earth game, adding colorful and flowery cows. ---

--- ## Features - When sheared, mooblooms give 5 flowers of their type and turn into normal cows. Cluckshrooms give 3 red mushrooms and turn into chickens. - When clicked on with mushroom stews, mooblooms give suspicious stews. - Mooblooms occasionnally place flowers of their type on grass blocks, and cluckshrooms place red mushrooms. ## FAQ - **Q:** Are moobloom flowers affected by resource packs and other mods (such as [Aestheticism](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aestheticism))? - **A:** Yes, they are! - **Q:** Forge? - **A:** No. - **Q:** 1.12.2? - **A:** I don't do backports.
